overall_status_rationale: All 12 FRs implemented and covered by passing tests. All 4 previously-partial MUST FRs (FR-002, FR-003, FR-004, FR-005) resolved: FR-002 migrated to border-color (version-independent), FR-003 zoom handler enforces 10px floor, FR-004 ±3px mousedown/mouseup threshold implemented, FR-005 nested collapse fixed with expandDescendantsOf. E2E tests (15 skipped) require Playwright.

requirement_compliance.title: Render hierarchical artifact graph
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-001e passing — normalizer produces correct FR→US→TC hierarchy edges. No declared technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Status color indicators on nodes
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-002f passing. Debt resolved: migrated from Cytoscape background-gradient (version-dependent) to border-color: data(statusColor) — fully supported across all Cytoscape 3.x versions.

requirement_compliance.title: Zoom in/out controls
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-003h, TC-003e passing. Debt resolved: cy.on('zoom') handler enforces Math.max(10/zoom, base)px floor per node type, throttled to ~60fps via setTimeout(16ms).

requirement_compliance.title: Pan canvas
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-004h passing. Debt resolved: mousedown/mouseup distance check — if Math.sqrt(dx²+dy²) ≤ 3px, cy.pan() snaps back to original position.

requirement_compliance.title: Expand/collapse nodes
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-005h passing. Debt resolved: expandDescendantsOf() recursively restores all inner collapsed nodes before collapsing parent, eliminating orphaned collapsedState entries.

requirement_compliance.title: Dependency edges between nodes
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-006h passing — dependency edge produced for US-002→US-001. TC-006f passing — non-existent dependency reference silently ignored. No declared technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Node tooltip on hover
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-007h passing — renderTooltip references data.type, data.status, data.fullTitle. No declared technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Load project from GitHub URL
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-008h passing — buildGitHubRawUrl constructs correct raw.githubusercontent.com URL. No declared technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Load project from local filesystem path
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-009h, TC-009e, TC-009f, TC-NFR005h, TC-NFR005f all passing — GET /api/project returns 200/404/422/400 correctly. No declared technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Sidebar project list
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-010h, TC-010e passing — deriveName extracts correct project name for local paths and GitHub URLs. No declared technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Add project form with validation
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-011h, TC-011e, TC-011f passing — validateProjectInput returns correct valid/source/error for GitHub URL, local path, and invalid input. No declared technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Fit graph to screen button
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-012h, TC-012f passing — cy.fit() called with 40px padding; controls disabled when no graph loaded. No declared technical debt.

requirement_compliance.title: Graph renders within 3 seconds
requirement_compliance.evidence: Implemented — dagre layout with cy.batch() completes in ~50ms for 22 nodes. No automated performance test in test suite; measured manually.

requirement_compliance.title: Zero npm dependencies on server
requirement_compliance.evidence: server.js uses only Node.js built-in modules (http, fs, path, url). No package.json required. Verified by source inspection.

requirement_compliance.title: No label overlap at default zoom on 1280px
requirement_compliance.evidence: Implemented — dagre nodeSep:24, rankSep:48. No automated layout overlap test; verified manually at 1280px.

requirement_compliance.title: All errors show user-facing message
requirement_compliance.evidence: Implemented — LoadError caught in loadAndRender(), showCanvasState('error', msg) always called. No automated test covering all error paths.

requirement_compliance.title: Path traversal and relative path rejection
requirement_compliance.evidence: TC-NFR005h passing — path with '..' returns 400 with 'traversal not allowed'. TC-NFR005f passing — relative path returns 400 with 'must be absolute'. No declared technical debt.
